perShot.promptTemplate: A comparison between {character} and a cartoon character on a phone screen, {style}.
{character} removes a hat to reveal {prop} on head, engaging in a funny dialogue, {emotion}.
A joke about the boss also having {prop} on head, {emotion}.
{character} standing in {scene} giving a thumbs up then laughing awkwardly, {emotion}.

variables.character: A young female university student in a chef uniform
variables.prop: A blue rat plush toy pulling hair strands
variables.product: Yafang frozen food packages including mutton hotpot
variables.scene: A professional kitchen or commercial freezer area
variables.style: Social media vlog style with bright lighting
